title: Embroidery
summary: Premium stitched branding with a durable, dimensional finish.
explanation: Embroidery gives logos and names a raised thread finish that feels polished on uniforms, outerwear, hats and staff apparel.
durability: Best suited to garments and accessories where a stitched finish supports repeated wear and washing.

title: DTF Printing
summary: Detailed full-colour transfers suitable for short and medium apparel runs.
explanation: DTF printing is a flexible choice for detailed logos, multi-colour artwork and smaller apparel batches where setup efficiency matters.
durability: A practical choice for many apparel projects when artwork detail and production flexibility are both important.

title: Screen Printing
summary: Bold, reliable printing designed for repeat orders and larger quantities.
explanation: Screen printing works well for strong graphic marks, events, team apparel and repeat uniform orders where consistent colour coverage is needed.
durability: A dependable option for repeat runs and higher quantities when artwork and garment choice fit the process.
